description: Searchable Markdown knowledge base of genuinely programming-useful tips from videos and written sources, with synthesized topic guides, examples, and source provenance.
rules: Prefer synthesized topic guides in docs/topics for direct answers.
For action, DDD, and overengineering questions, read docs/topics/avoid-overengineering.md and docs/topics/laravel-actions.md practical rules before using code examples.
Use docs/videos and docs/articles for source provenance.
Treat video and article notes as summarized learning material, not official PHP or Laravel documentation.
Prefer tips that are reusable in programming practice: code quality, testing, architecture, tooling, security, domain modeling, and workflow.
Do not quote transcripts or articles verbatim; use paraphrased tips and source URLs.
